failedToLoad: Failed to load projects. Make sure agents are online.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to start deploying.

card.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? All environments will be destroyed. This cannot be undone.

config.title: Project Configuration
config.description: Manage deploy keys and private submodule access for this project.

deployKey.title: Repository Deploy Key
deployKey.instruction: Add this key to your repository under Settings → Deploy keys.
deployKey.empty: No deploy key yet. Generate one to give this project SSH read access to your repository.

submodule.title: Submodule Repositories
submodule.instruction: For each private submodule, add its SSH URL and copy the generated deploy key into the submodule repo's settings.
submodule.keyInstruction: Add this key to the submodule repo under Settings → Deploy keys.

validation.nameFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. No spaces or special characters.

createForm.title: Create a new project
createForm.projectNameHelper: Lowercase, hyphens only. Used as subdomain.
createForm.noAgents: No agents online. Please check your infrastructure.
createForm.planDescription: Choose how this project scales. Growth happens by adding workers/storage on top of the paid plan, not by switching tiers.
createForm.adminDescription: Credentials for the initial Odoo admin user.
createForm.repoDescription: Optionally link a GitHub repository for code deployment.
createForm.connectGitHub: Connect GitHub to create or link a repository.
createForm.newRepoHelper: A new private repository will be created in your GitHub account.
